injection_points.name: userCode.ts
injection_points.description: Primary injection target. AI-generated code is written here. Must compile standalone.

injection_points.name: userCode.vue
injection_points.description: Optional Vue SFC injection target. Used when AI generates .vue files.

injection_contract.description: The injected code MUST export a `run()` async function as its entry point. The flow runner will call this function. If the code is a Vue component, it should be wrapped in a .ts file that mounts the component and exports run().
injection_contract.fallback_behavior: If no run() export is found, the flow will import the module for side-effects only and wait for timeout.

run_generated.description: Generic flow: imports the injected userCode module, calls its run() export, and waits for completion or timeout.

vue_support.description: When .vue files are injected, a Vue type shim is auto-created to satisfy TypeScript.
